Train with purpose, fuel your body, and join a community that never quits.

OUR SERVICES

Helping you stay fit, active,
and healthy.

01 01
Strength Training

Unlock your full potential with expert-guided strength workouts designed to build muscle, power, and endurance.

02 02
Personal Training

One-on-one coaching tailored to your goals, fitness level, and lifestyle for faster, smarter results.

Learn More
03 03
Nutrition Coaching

Fitness starts in the kitchen. Get customized diet plans and expert guidance to support your fitness journey.

0 +

Years Of Experience
ABOUT US

Empowering Fitness, One Rep at a Time

We’re not just a gym — we’re a mindset built on strength, focus, and real results. Every workout is designed to move you forward, physically and mentally.

Read More
01

Clean & Safe Environment

Hygiene is our top priority. We maintain spotless spaces and sanitize equipment regularly.

02

Expert Coaches

Trained professionals who know how to push your limits safely and effectively.

03

Goal-Focused Programs

Whether it's weight loss, muscle gain, or stamina — we design plans that get real results.

OUR TESTIMONIAL

What Our Members Are Saying

Sarah M.

The trainers here are amazing. They pushed me past my limits in a way I never thought possible. I feel stronger, leaner, and more confident than ever!

Rachel L.

I've never felt so confident and strong in my life. The trainers at Malfit pushed me to new heights and helped me achieve goals I never thought possible. I feel amazing!

Alex B.

The support and guidance from the trainers have been exceptional. They've encouraged me to exceed my limits, and now I feel healthier, more energized, and self-assured!

Emily T.

Malfit's trainers have been a game-changer for me. Their guidance and support have helped me achieve my fitness goals and feel more confident and empowered in my own skin. I couldn't be happier with my results!

Rachel K.

The trainers here are amazing. They pushed me past my limits in a way I never thought possible. I feel stronger, leaner, and more confident than ever!

Emily R.

I was blown away by the personalized attention and expert guidance from the trainers. They helped me push past my limits and achieve results I never thought possible. I feel more energized, confident, and empowered than ever!

TESTIMONIAL
OUR CLASS

Classes That Fit Your Lifestyle

See all class

Boxing Burnout

Burn fat and boost stamina with fast-paced boxing drills and technique.

Strength Training

Build lean muscle and increase overall power with expert-guided weight training.

HIIT Xtreme

High-intensity intervals that challenge endurance and spike metabolism.

OUR PLAN

Choose Your Plan

Basic Plan

$29 Per month

Access to gym during off-peak hours

Get Started

Features

  • Standard equipment access
  • 5 group classes/month
  • Access to locker rooms
  • Gym access during working hours

Standard Plan

Most Popular
$69 Per month

Everything in Basic, plus more

Features

  • Standard equipment access
  • 5 group classes/month
  • Access to locker rooms
  • Gym access during working hours

Premium Plan

$99 Per month

The ultimate gym experience.

Get Started

Features

  • Standard equipment access
  • 5 group classes/month
  • Access to locker rooms
  • Gym access during working hours

Know Your Fitness Level

Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) to track your health goals

BMI Weight Category
Under 18.5 Underweight
25 – 29.9 Normal weight
25 – 29.9 Overweight
30 – 34.9 Obese
BMI: Body Mass Index

Beginner’s Guide to Gym Confidence

New to the gym? Here’s how to overcome anxiety and make the most of your workouts.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Wear comfortable, breathable clothes that allow easy movement. Bare feet are ideal for yoga practice.

Mats are provided, but feel free to bring your own if you prefer.

Opt for loose-fitting, moisture-wicking attire for unrestricted movement. Practicing barefoot enhances grip and balance.

To book a class, visit our schedule page and click on the class you wish to attend. You will be prompted to create an account and purchase a class package. Once you have done so, you can reserve a spot in the class. If you have any questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Yes, beginners are welcome to join our yoga classes. Our classes are designed to be accessible to all levels, and our experienced instructors will guide you through the practice and provide modifications as needed.

Classes can be canceled up to 12 hours in advance for a full refund or reschedule.

Welcome to Your New Fitness Family

Whether you're just starting out or leveling up, we’ve got your back — every rep of the way.

Contact Us

LIFESTYLE RESET

"Lifestyle Reset Gym is where focus, strength, and transformation come together to build your best self."
